content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.05%, India VIX +9.3% to 18.41 — broad risk-off with Realty/Energy/Auto leading down. IT and Pharma showing defensive relative strength on INR weakness. Daily unrealized -2.46% driven primarily by MCX position which shows a suspect CMP (INR 3192 vs entry 8400, -62% — likely data corruption since intraday candles show MCX trading 3100-3215 today consistent with its actual price range; entry cost basis appears mis-recorded). Book is 54% deployed, cash 46% — room to add selectively but VIX spike argues for discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold hedge intact; -1.1% within noise. SL 121 below current support 121.84. VIX spike +9% supports gold thesis. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (+22% revenue, +18% PAT), record high, MOFSL TP 950. +3.3% unrealized. SL already at 832 (breakeven+); CMP 846 gives 1.65% gap — adequate trail. No change needed; logging HOLD intent via no-op MODIFY is wasted — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.30,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "+10.1% winner with Q4 +145% QoQ, Encora deal closed, brokerage targets 1690-2020. SL 1357.30 vs CMP 1384 = 1.9% gap — within 1% trail-gap discipline floor. Holding existing SL; current SL already above breakeven by ~8%. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry but Q4 PAT +47% FY26, refrigerant cycle bottoming, MOFSL TP 3427. SL 2740 vs CMP 2786 = 1.65% gap. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Q4 revenue +27% but PAT only +6% — margin compression flagged. Stock at fresh 52w high 9136 today on 3.3x volume. SL 8950 = 1.2% below CMP 9062. UltraTech competitive threat from Dec 2026 is structural overhang. Hold but cap upside expectation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at 12000 (tender route) + Rs 150 dividend, record date May 29 — provides price floor. -1.5% unrealized within noise. SL 10440 = 1.5% below CMP. Hold through buyback record."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results out; FY27 guidance upgraded to low double-digit. -1.7% intraday on a -1% Nifty day is in-line. SL 468 = 2.2% below CMP. Hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD. +3.7% winner, FY26 PAT +148%, ATH today 1274.50. SL 1255 vs CMP 1271.50 = 1.3% gap — within trail floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +21.6%, revenue +18% — strong beat. Up 9.2% today on results. +0.5% from my entry (recent fill). SL 1198 below entry 1248 = -4% (within budget). Hold; let momentum run toward 1330 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "FY26 results in, order book 17,100 Cr, BSE Capital Goods at record. -0.0% essentially flat. SL 850 = 1.5% below CMP 863. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 20 — 7 trading sessions away (outside Rule 11 3-session window). HSBC upgrade to TP 9000. -0.2% flat. SL 7950 = 1.5% below CMP. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Position shows -62% P&L due to apparent data inconsistency — CMP feed in position update shows 3192 vs entry 8400, but intraday candles confirm MCX trades at 3192 today. If entry was genuinely 8400 the position would have stopped at SL 8150 long ago. This is most likely a cost-basis data error (possibly pre-split or stale entry record). I cannot safely act on a position with corrupted state — emitting HOLD and flagging for operational review rather than executing an EXIT that may mis-trigger on bad data. MCX Q4 earnings call TODAY 4 PM is a near-term catalyst; SL appears mis-set at 8150 (above any realistic CMP)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Organon $11.75B deal, Q4 results ~May 20-21 (outside 3-session window). Near 52w high. -0.2% essentially flat. SL 1830 = 2.2% below CMP. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL 121 adequate."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 832 already above entry 820 (locked breakeven+1.5%). 1.65% gap to CMP within trail floor."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1357.30 locks +7.8% gain. 1.9% gap to CMP — within trail-floor discipline. Letting target 1450 work."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 2740 = -1.6% from entry; flat position, no trail trigger yet."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 8950 = -1.6% from entry; holding original risk."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000 (May 29); SL 10440 = -3% from entry, holding."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 468 = -3.9% from entry, within risk budget."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1255 above entry 1226 — locked +2.4%. 1.3% gap to CMP within floor."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh entry, SL 1198 at -4% budget; let thesis develop."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 850 = -1.7% from entry, flat."},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 7950 = -1.8% from entry; Q4 results May 20 outside 3-session window."},
    {"symbol": "MCX", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Apparent cost-basis data corruption (entry 8400 vs CMP 3192 with no prior SL trigger at 8150). Flagging for operational review; will not act on corrupted state."},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1830 = -2.4% from entry; Q4 results outside 3-session window."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH candidates not admitted this cycle and why each was rejected — explicit per Rule 18: (1) TATACONSUM (+0.05 bull): already have an OPEN LIMIT BUY 20@1240 from 356 min ago AND a filled holding of 40 — Rule 9 prohibits stacking; the pending BUY at 1240 is now unlikely to fill (CMP 1257) and the thesis has played out, will cancel via dedicated action if engine supports it. (2) MCX (+0.05): Q4 conf call TODAY 4 PM — binary event within hours, Rule 11 blocks new entry. (3) APOLLOHOSP (+0.08): Q4 results May 20 = 7 sessions out, outside hard 3-session window but I already hold the name — no add given +0.08 modifier doesn't justify doubling concentration. (4) SUNPHARMA (+0.07): Already held; Q4 May 20-21; no add. (5) BAJAJ-AUTO (+0.08-0.10): Already held; buyback floor priced in; CMP at 52w high with stretched R:R per BofA TP 10700 (~1% upside). (6) COFORGE (+0.10): Already held with +10% gain; adding at 1384 after a 7.7% intraday spike is chasing. (7) CGPOWER (+0.08), POLYCAB (+0.05), DABUR (+0.07), MARICO (+0.07), LAURUSLABS (+0.12), SRF (+0.10): all already held — Rule 18 explicitly says sector tags don't preclude adds, but adding to a position already at ~5% size on the same thesis is concentration without diversification. (8) THERMAX from watchlist: not in deep-dive data, can't act. (9) INFY/HCLTECH (NEUTRAL, -0.03/-0.04): explicit neutral-to-bearish modifiers, do not pass min_confidence bar. Net: zero new BUYs justified — the qualifying-bullish names are either already held, in binary-event window, or extended at 52w highs. This is NOT anchored conservatism; it is a genuinely saturated watchlist where my existing book already captures the bullish themes.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 54%, cash 46% (~₹452K idle). Soft target 80% — I am ~26 ppt under. However, today's tape (Nifty -1.05%, VIX +9.3%) plus the fact that 11 of 13 watchlist BULLISH names are already in book, means the right add-side action is to let the book breathe and re-assess tomorrow when (a) US CPI clears, (b) MCX Q4 call digests, (c) VIX spike resolves. Critical operational issue: MCX position shows -62% with entry 8400 vs CMP 3192 — this is data corruption, not a real loss; the SL 8150 would have triggered weeks ago if real. Flagging for operations review. Excluding MCX, true unrealized P&L is roughly +₹4,500 across the other 12 positions — book is actually healthy. OPEN order: TATACONSUM LIMIT 1240 (356 min stale, CMP 1257) — thesis already filled via the 40-share holding; this pending BUY should be cancelled, not allowed to lurk. CGPOWER, POLYCAB, BAJAJ-AUTO are clustered in Capital Goods/Auto cyclicals — combined ~₹65K = ~6.7% capital, well within cluster cap."
}
